case: I was diagnosed with stage 2 breast cancer and I'm having a lumpectomy next month. I feel very tired all the time (fatigue) and I'm anxious about starting any exercise. My appetite has also dropped a lot.
preferences: I'm vegetarian. I like walking but I have a bad knee so no running.

case: I have laryngeal cancer (voice box) and I'm partway through radiation. I'm having a lot of trouble swallowing and my voice is very hoarse. I want to know how to cope with eating and protect my voice.
Colon cancer, currently on chemotherapy. I get a lot of nausea and mouth sores and I'm not sure what I can eat. I've lost some weight. Are there foods that help, and is it safe to take supplements?

My husband was just diagnosed with glioblastoma (a brain tumour). We are both terrified and I can't sleep. I want to understand how to support him emotionally and what practical help exists for caregivers.
I have cancer and I feel really bad. What should I do?
Tengo cáncer de mama en estadio 3 y voy a empezar quimioterapia pronto. Tengo mucho miedo y quiero saber cómo cuidar mi alimentación y mi ánimo durante el tratamiento.
